channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪 US to Withdraw 5,000 Troops from Germany Amid Iran War Dispute
item.description: The Pentagon announced the withdrawal of 5,000 troops from Germany in the next 6-12 months, 14% of the 36,000 US forces stationed there. The move follows Chancellor Merz criticizing the US lack of strategy in the Iran war.

item.title: ⚖️ US Appeals Court Blocks Mail-Order Access to Abortion Pill Mifepristone
item.description: A federal appeals court in New Orleans ruled that mifepristone prescriptions can only be distributed in person at clinics, overturning FDA regulations. The decision is the biggest shift in US abortion policy since Roe v. Wade was overturned in 2022.

item.title: ✈️ Trump Weighs Taxpayer-Funded Bailout for Bankrupt Spirit Airlines
item.description: President Trump said his administration is still considering a government takeover of Spirit Airlines, which has filed for bankruptcy for the second time in two years. The president suggested the government could resell the airline for a profit once oil prices driven up by the Iran war decrease.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇻🇳 Japan PM Takaichi in Hanoi to Unveil New Indo-Pacific Strategy
item.description: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi arrived in Vietnam to deliver a major policy speech marking 10 years of the Free and Open Indo-Pacific initiative. She will call for collaboration on AI, energy security, and undersea cables while strengthening supply chains away from China.

item.title: 🇬🇧📺 BBC to Cut Up to 2,000 Jobs in Cost Reduction
item.description: The BBC announced plans to eliminate up to 2,000 positions as part of a 10% budget cut, as the UK public broadcaster faces financial pressures and an uncertain media landscape.

item.title: 🇪🇺💰 ECB Policymakers Warn Rate Hikes May Be Needed
item.description: European Central Bank officials warned that inflation may linger and rate increases could be necessary if the economic outlook does not improve, as energy costs from the Iran conflict continue to pressure prices.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 Raul Castro Joins May Day March as US Tensions Simmer
item.description: Former Cuban leader Raul Castro, 94, joined thousands in Havanas May Day march passing the US embassy, as US-Cuba tensions reach near-unprecedented levels.

item.title: 🇦🇺📈 Australia Central Bank Seen Raising Rates Again
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia is expected to raise its cash rate to 4.35% on May 5, with a growing minority of economists forecasting further increases as inflation pressures mount.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuela Acting President Deflects Questions on Election Timeline
item.description: Acting President Delcy Rodriguez remained non-committal on when elections would be held to fill the presidential vacancy, more than 100 days after Nicolas Maduro capture.

item.title: ✈️ Spirit Airlines May Shut Down Without Bailout Deal
item.description: Spirit Airlines is preparing to potentially shut down operations if a bailout deal is not reached, with reports suggesting the shutdown could begin as early as Saturday.

item.title: 🇪🇺🚗 Trump Raises Tariffs on EU Cars to 25%, Citing Trade Deal Violations
item.description: President Trump announced he will increase tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25% next week, up from the previously agreed 15%, accusing the bloc of not complying with the trade deal.

item.title: ⛽📈 US Gas Prices Hit Four-Year High at $4.39 Per Gallon
item.description: The national average for regular gasoline reached $4.39 per gallon, the highest level in four years. Prices have surged since the Iran war began, rising 21.2% in March alone.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇵🇰 Trump Dissatisfied with Iran Peace Proposal, Says Leadership Disjointed
item.description: Trump expressed frustration with Irans latest peace proposal delivered via Pakistani mediators, saying Iranian leadership is very disjointed with tremendous discord among factions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪🪖 Hegseth orders withdrawal of 5,000 US troops from Germany
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ordered the withdrawal of approximately 5,000 US troops from Germany within 6-12 months, following tensions between Trump and German Chancellor Merz over the Iran war and NATO burden-sharing.

item.title: 🤖🇺🇸⚔️ Google, Nvidia and tech giants sign AI deals with Pentagon
item.description: Eight major tech companies including Google, Nvidia, SpaceX, Microsoft, Amazon and OpenAI have signed agreements with the Pentagon to deploy AI on classified military networks. The DoD aims to make the US military an "AI-first fighting force."

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚖️ Trump Declares Iran War "Terminated" as War Powers Deadline Arrives
item.description: The White House says the ceasefire has "terminated" hostilities for the purposes of the congressional war powers deadline, as Trump huddles with military leaders over potential new strikes.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia Launches Record 400-Plus Drone Attack on Ukraine
item.description: Russia fired over 400 drones at Ukraine in a daytime attack, injuring 10 people in Ternopil, marking the largest drone assault of the war as peace talks remain stalled.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine Announces Army Reform Plan to Address Infantry Shortages
item.description: Ukraine unveiled plans for summer military reforms to tackle infantry shortages and discharge longest-serving soldiers, four years into the grinding war with stalled peace talks.

item.title: 🛢️💰 Investors Running Out of Time to Brace for Oil Price Shock
item.description: Markets focused on AI boom and hopes of a short Iran war have yet to price in a potential doubling of physical oil prices as the Strait of Hormuz remains disrupted.

item.title: ⚡🌍 Iran War "Supercharging" Global Shift to Renewable Energy
item.description: The Middle East conflict is accelerating the worldwide transition to renewable energy sources as countries seek to reduce dependence on oil from the volatile region.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪 US to Withdraw 5,000 Troops From Germany
item.description: The Pentagon announced the withdrawal of 5,000 US troops from Germany amid a widening rift between President Trump and German Chancellor Merz over the Iran war.

item.title: 🛢️💰 Barclays Raises 2026 Brent Forecast to $100
item.description: Barclays raised its 2026 Brent crude forecast from $85 to $100 per barrel, citing prolonged Strait of Hormuz disruption from the ongoing Iran conflict.

item.title: ⛽🇺🇸 California Gasoline Hits $6 Per Gallon
item.description: Motorists in California are paying $6 per gallon for gasoline, the highest price in two years, as the Iran war and Hormuz blockade drive fuel costs higher.

item.title: 🏛️🇺🇸 Trump Tells Congress Iran War "Terminated"
item.description: President Trump sent letters to Congress asserting that hostilities with Iran have "terminated," attempting to avoid the 60-day War Powers deadline that would require congressional authorization.

item.title: 💰🇮🇷 Iranian Elite Family Founded Major Crypto Exchange Used by IRGC
item.description: Reuters investigation reveals the Kharrazi family, one of Iran's most powerful families, founded Nobitex crypto exchange which has become central to moving funds beyond US sanctions during the Iran war.
